FORECASTED_MOVES_POWER.title: Forecasted Moves
FORECASTED_MOVES_POWER.description: This unit's upcoming intent has been foretold.
OMNISCIENCE_DOUBLE_POWER.title: Omniscience Double
OMNISCIENCE_DOUBLE_POWER.description: This effect causes the related Omniscience resolution to occur one additional time.
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_POWER_MOONLIT_TRANSFER: At end of turn, transfer one of your debuffs to all enemies.
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_POWER_NONEXISTENCE_AUR: Whenever you play a Power card, gain [blue]8[] Block; future powers applied to you are doubled; your Power cards cost [blue]1[] less (minimum 0).
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_POWER_ORB_FOR_ALL_POWE: Whenever you channel an orb, each other player channels the same orb type.
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_POWER_TEACH_AND_LEARN_: Whenever you play a Power card and gain a power from it, each other player gains the same power.
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_POWER_GENSHIN_FORM_POW:
On play, transform cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold], [gold]Discard[/gold], and [gold]Exhaust[/gold]: Powers become [gold]Rolling Boulder[/gold], Attacks become [gold]Giant Rock[/gold], and Skills become [gold]Offering[/gold].
Whenever you lose HP, allies heal that much HP.
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_POWER_OPERATION_FORM_P:
When your Attacks deal damage, draw that many cards.
After you play a Skill, discard cards equal to that card's Block value.
Whenever you shuffle, all players gain [blue]3[/blue] Energy and draw [blue]3[/blue] cards.
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_POWER_GENEROUS_FORM_PO:
Allies' Attack damage grants you equal [gold]Forge[/gold].
Whenever you Forge, add a [gold]Largesse+[/gold] with [gold]Exhaust[/gold] to each ally's hand.
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_POWER_PURPLE_FORM_POWE:
After damage is dealt, apply equal [gold]Doom[/gold] instead.
At end of your side's turn, if an enemy's [gold]Doom[/gold] is at least its current HP, immediately resolve that Doom.
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_POWER_BELIEVE_FORM_POW:
When you channel an orb, also channel the same orb for a random ally.
Whenever a player's orb passive triggers, that player gains a [gold]Believe In You+[/gold] with [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_POWER_SNAKE_GOD_FORM_P: Whenever your Attacks deal damage, also apply that much [gold]Poison[/gold].
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_POWER_STAR_GOD_FORM_PO: Whenever your Attacks deal damage, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Star[/gold].
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_POWER_VAKUU_FORM_POWER: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold], heal [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] of your Max HP (minimum [blue]1[/blue]), then [gold]Vakuu[/gold] takes over your turn.
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_POWER_MECH_GOD_FORM_PO: Whenever you [gold]Evoke[/gold] an Orb, gain [blue]1[/blue] temporary [gold]Focus[/gold].
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_POWER_MECH_GOD_TEMPORA: Gain [gold]Focus[/gold] until the end of this turn.
